headline: World Cup: Why US hotels may not be seeing the turnout they expected
summary: With the 2026 World Cup underway, host cities in the US, Canada, and Mexico are reporting "uneven" demand in hotel bookings. American Hotel & Lodging Association CEO Rosanna Maietta tries to make sense of the data driving this trend.

raw.headline: World Cup: Why US hotels may not be seeing the turnout they expected
raw.summary: With the 2026 World Cup underway, host cities in the US, Canada, and Mexico are reporting "uneven" demand in hotel bookings. American Hotel & Lodging Association CEO Rosanna Maietta tries to make sense of the data driving this trend.

headline: Consumer Internet Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB)
summary: Looking back on consumer internet stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) and its peers.
